name: Montrose (Montrose)

restrictions.text: Fire restrictions in place, for up to date info:

thresholds:
ERC > 90%, BI > 90%, Wind Speed > 15
Max Temp > 90, Min Rh < 15, 1000-hr Fuels <13, Max RH < 55
If three or more of the seven thresholds are met, consider it a watchout.
raws:
The Montrsoe Fire Danger Rating Area uses the following Remote Automated Weather Stations (RAWS) which are equally weighted in value, using Fuel Model Y (Timber) incorporating data years 2005-2024 are:  
Cottonwood (53805), Jay (52704)
